current_live_dns_audit.conflict: MX points to cloudmail.io but SPF includes Cloudflare — align before go-live

addresses.purpose: Supabase Auth sender — use as custom SMTP From only, no forward

go_live_steps: 2. Add destination address (your inbox) and verify
3. Create routing rules for support@, billing@, security@
4. Update MX to Cloudflare Email Routing targets (dashboard provides values)
5. Update SPF TXT to: v=spf1 include:_spf.mx.cloudflare.net ~all
7. Keep DMARC at p=quarantine until deliverability confirmed, then p=reject
8. Supabase Auth → SMTP Settings → set noreply@laslogtmx.com as sender (custom SMTP or Resend/SendGrid)
9. Test send from Supabase confirm-signup template before announcing go-live

rollback.note: Screenshot current MX/TXT before any change. TTL 300 = ~5 min recovery.
